calendar.matters:
Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; For Surcharge For Lossses Sustained By Reason Of Breach Of Trust. Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Lee for (respondent) Linda Dell'Angelica who is present in court.

The court asked counsel and the clerk if anyone had heard from Mr. Libarle who is not present and they had not and that we are here with respect to status on the settlement agreement. Mr. Lee reported that there was an interim settlement in December, that they agreed to a six month continuance to carry out tasks, that his client has done all that they were asked to do by the settlement agreement and stated that the case should be dismissed. The Court took the Petition for relief from breach of trust; etc., off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; For Surcharge For Lossses Sustained By Reason Of Breach Of Trust. Etc.
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Continued To Aug-11-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Libarle for Steven Dell'Angelica (Petitioner). George Lee for Linda Dell'Angelica (Respondent).

Mr. Libarle stated that mediation is complete, that they have an interim settlement agreement which provides for various procedures (obtain a professional to assist with taxes and the accounting/add the new Trustee to the bank accounts, etc.) to be carried out and that the parties have agreed to a six month continuance. Mr. Lee stated that six months will allow the petitioner to determine if the requirements are complied with and how to proceed. Mr. Libarle also stated that the settlement provides that parties will act in good faith. The Petition for Relief From Breach of Trust, etc. was continued to August 11, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status with the expectation that before that point the matter will go off calendar. If the matter is not resolved by then, the Parties are to file response to the Probate Examiner's notes and inform the Court of any remaining issues.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Saephan. (Not Reported)

Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; For Surcharge For Lossses Sustained By Reason Of Breach Of Trust. Etc.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Continued To Feb-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; For Surcharge For Lossses Sustained By Reason Of Breach Of Trust. Etc.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Jan-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Libarle for Steven Dell'Angelica. George Lee for Respondent.

Counsel reported that mediation is to occur in two days and that they have agreed to a continuance to the end of January. The Petition for Relief from Breach of Trust, etc. was continued to January 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status or setting.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; For Surcharge For Lossses Sustained By Reason Of Breach Of Trust. Etc.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; For Surcharge For Lossses Sustained By Reason Of Breach Of Trust. Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2014 Continued To Nov-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marc Libarle for Steven Dell'Angelica. George Lee for and with Linda Dell'Angelica.

Counsel requested a continuance and a referral to mediation. The Court noted that there is no proof of service. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 14, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 14, 2014. The Petition for Relief from Breach of Trust, for Accounting, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on November 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
